regulatoryStatus: USYC is associated with Hashnote International Short Duration Yield Fund Ltd., described as a Cayman Islands registered mutual fund, and Circle International Bermuda Limited, described as a BMA-licensed digital asset business / token administrator. USYC access is restricted to eligible non-U.S. persons and subject to onboarding, KYC/AML, and wallet permissioning.
primaryRegulator: Bermuda Monetary Authority / Cayman Islands Monetary Authority
regulatoryFramework: Bermuda digital asset business licensing; Cayman Islands registered mutual fund; Regulation S / non-U.S. investor distribution context; KYC/AML and sanctions screening controls
allowedJurisdictions: Non-U.S. persons only, subject to eligibility and onboarding requirements
amlPolicy: Official onboarding documentation states that investors must complete KYC/AML review and wallet screening before minting, redeeming, or transferring USYC. A standalone public AML policy document was not found.

_meta.notes: Compliance layer is supported by official Circle/Hashnote docs, terms, and legal disclosures. Public legal opinion, full blocked jurisdiction list, and formal AML policy document were not found. accreditedOnly remains false because the verified restriction is non-U.S./eligible institutional access, not a clearly sourced U.S. accredited-investor-only requirement.
